name: Prisma Generate on Schema Change
description: Remind agent to run prisma generate after schema edits

then.prompt: The Prisma schema was just edited. Remind the user to run `pnpm db:generate` to regenerate the client at lib/generated/prisma. If the change adds a new model or field, also suggest running `pnpm db:push` for dev or `pnpm db:migrate` for production.
